languages.text: В шипящей жиже плавают искусно вылепленные части тел — такие же кошмарные, как у бродячих конструктов.

traits.locale_text: В шипящей жиже плавают искусно вылепленные части тел — такие же кошмарные, как у бродячих конструктов.
В шипящей жиже плавают искусно вылепленные части тел — такие же кошмарные, как у бродячих конструктов.

languages.text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.
languages.original_text: В шипящей жиже плавают искусно вылепленные части тел — такие же кошмарные, как у бродячих конструктов.

traits.locale_text: There are artfully molded body parts floating in the viscous hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.
There are artfully molded body parts floating in the viscous hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.
There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: In der zischenden Gülle schwimmen kunstvoll geformte Körperteile — genauso alptraumhaft wie die, die die wandernden Konstrukte hatten.
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: Des parties de corps moulées avec art flottent dans la boue sifflante, tout aussi cauchemardesques que celles des constructions errantes.
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: 在嘶嘶作响的泥浆中漂浮着经过艺术加工的肢体--就像那些游荡的构造物一样令人毛骨悚然。
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: Hay partes del cuerpo artísticamente moldeadas flotando en el lodo sibilante, tan pesadillescas como las que tenían los constructos errantes.
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: ヒュルヒュルと音を立てるスラリーの中には、芸術的に成形された体のパーツが浮かんでいる。
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.

languages.text: Tıslayan bulamacın içinde yüzen, ustalıkla şekillendirilmiş vücut parçaları var — tıpkı gezgin yapıların sahip oldukları kadar kabus gibi.
languages.original_text: There are artfully moulded body parts floating in the hissing slurry — just as nightmarish as the ones the wandering constructs had.
